description: Reorder the home page sections so PRDs appear above build notes, without changing card content or styling.

userStories.title: Move PRD section above build notes
userStories.description: As a reader, I want to see PRDs before build notes so I can browse by specs first.
acceptanceCriteria: The PRD section appears above the build notes section on the home page
PRD cards remain unchanged in content and styling
Verify in browser using agent-browser skill
userStories.notes: Reordered home page sections; lint/typecheck clean. Verified in browser on Feb 3, 2026.

userStories.title: Keep build notes below PRDs
userStories.description: As a reader, I want to still see recent build notes after PRDs so I can scan the latest updates.
acceptanceCriteria: The build notes section appears below the PRD section on the home page
Build note cards remain unchanged in content and styling
Verify in browser using agent-browser skill
userStories.notes: Build notes remain below PRDs after reorder; no content changes. Verified on Feb 3, 2026.
